response:
"  
<<Numbers on the Board>>  
Numbers are written on the board. Five largest numbers add up to 0.29. Five smallest numbers add up to 0.26.  

* * *  
Midnight arrives quietly. Numbers remain unchanged. Calculations begin slowly.  

* * *  
Sum of all numbers is unknown. Five largest numbers are part of it. Five smallest numbers are also part of it.  

* * *  
Let total numbers be [n]. Sum of all numbers is [s]. Five largest numbers sum to [s1]. Five smallest numbers sum to [s2].  

* * *  
Equation for five largest numbers is [s1] = 0.29[s]. Equation for five smallest numbers is [s2] = 0.26[s].  

* * *  
Total numbers are [n]. Five largest and five smallest are part of [n]. Remaining numbers are [r].  

* * *  
Sum of remaining numbers is [s3]. Equation is [s3] = [s] - [s1] - [s2]. Substituting values gives [s3] = [s] - 0.29[s] - 0.26[s].  

* * *  
Simplifying equation gives [s3] = 0.45[s]. Remaining numbers are [r] = [n] - 10.  

* * *  
Committee reviews the data. Numbers must be positive. Calculation shows [n] = 20.  

* * *  
Book is not involved. Book is not needed. Book is not required.  
"
